---
title: "Development Log"
format: html
---

### 9 December 2024

-   I finished the documentation

-   Starting to think about vignettes - need help

-   In the space on vignettes, HW mentions that if you're using a complex algorithm in your code, a vignette is a good place to explain it and then suggests submitting the vignette to the Journal of Statistical Software or the R Journal. (I know we already decided against these.) It then goes on to say that if we want to "provide something lightweight so folks can easily cite our package," consider the Journal of Open Source Software, which has a "particularly speedy submission and review process" and where "welcome to the Tidyverse was published." This might be something for us to consider.

https://joss.theoj.org/

### 3 September 2024

Keah

- make actual notes of what I have done throughout the process (including the changes of Headrick's method code)

- documentation

Mike

- find out about creating packages/repos

- revise manuscript

### 2 September 2024

- renamed files

- renamed functions

- cleaned up functions with styler package

- process

  - load_all()
  
  - document()
  
  - check()
  
- cleaned up all the warnings and notes from the check except documentation

- next step is documentation
